assertions.assertion: Test with role=admin claims asserts HttpStatusCode.NoContent (204)
assertions.rationale: Standard HTTP response code testing knowledge

assertions.assertion: Test with role=viewer claims asserts HttpStatusCode.Forbidden (403)
assertions.rationale: Standard HTTP response code testing knowledge

assertions.assertion: Test with no claims (unauthenticated) asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401)
assertions.rationale: Standard HTTP response code testing knowledge

assertions.assertion: Each test sets distinct claims via the TestClaimsProvider before making the request
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might use a different mechanism than TestClaimsProvider for per-test claim setup

assertions.assertion: Uses IClassFixture<T> or equivalent to share the WebApplicationFactory across tests
assertions.rationale: IClassFixture is standard xUnit pattern for sharing test infrastructure
